name: pow-build-issue
description: Build a ClickUp task that is in 'Ready to Build' status for Protect Our Winters
notes: Not directly scheduled — invoked inline by the poll-clickup routine when a task lands in 'Ready to Build'. Can also be fired manually via RemoteTrigger for debugging a specific task. ClickUp and Slack interactions use MCP connectors (not curl) — the environment MUST have ClickUp and Slack connectors attached. Auth is handled by the connectors, so no CLICKUP_API_KEY or SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is needed.
